sourcesContent:
import React from "react"; function Preview({ data }) { return (

{data.name}

{data.email} | {data.phone}

{data.github}

{data.linkedin}

Technical Skills

{data.technicalSkills}

Certifications

{data.certifications}

Career Objective

{data.objective}

Education

{data.education.map((item, i) => (

{item.degree}

{item.college}

{item.year}

))}

Projects

{data.projects.map((item, i) => (

{item.title}

{item.tech}

{item.description}

))}
); } export default Preview;
